name: HEALTHY CHOICE WELLNESS CORP.
business: Healthy Choice Wellness Corp. operates natural and organic grocery stores and sells dietary supplements. The company offers fresh produce, bulk foods, vitamins, supplements, and health & beauty products through multiple retail banners. It also sells vitamins and supplements online via www.TheVitaminStore.com.

exposures.sentence: We operate within the natural products retail industry, which is a subset of the United States grocery industry and the dietary supplement business.
